articles.title: Telecom body COAI announces new leadership, appoints Rahul Vatts as chairperson
articles.description: COAI, India's digital communications body, held its annual meeting, electing Rahul Vatts of Bharti Airtel as Chairperson and Dr. Ravi P. Gandhi of Reliance Jio as Vice-Chairperson for 2026-27. The organization emphasized the sector's crucial role in India's digital economy, highlighting the evolution of technologies like 5G Advanced and AI. COAI pledged to collaborate with stakeholders for trusted, secure, and future-ready infrastructure to boost economic growth.

articles.title: All About Trump's New Air Force One: A $400 Million Jet Gifted By Qatar
articles.description: The United States Air Force has introduced a new "bridge aircraft", a modified Boeing 747-8i, to support presidential travel amid delays in the long-term Air Force One replacement programme.

articles.title: Hack of the Day: How to build a smart home on a budget of under Rs 10,000
articles.description: Transform your home into a smart haven without breaking the bank. For under ₹10,000, you can achieve voice-controlled lights, automated appliances, and basic security by building your setup in phases. Start with an affordable voice hub, then add smart plugs and bulbs. Finally, integrate security cameras and sensors for a truly connected and convenient living experience, all while staying within a single ecosystem.

articles.title: Word of the Day: Ubiquitous
articles.description: Word of the Day: Ubiquitous means something found everywhere. Learn its meaning, origin, pronunciation and how it reflects modern life and technology.

articles.title: Dassault Aviation's all-new Falcon 10X successfully completes first flight
articles.description: Dassault Aviation's Falcon 10X successfully completed its maiden flight, a 2.5-hour journey from Bordeaux-Merignac. The flight marks the launch of the test campaign for the all-new business jet, a milestone for the company's engineers and teams.

articles.title: Here's when Infinix is launching the Note 60 Pro 5G Pininfarina Limited Edition in India
articles.description: Infinix's Note 60 Ultra is designed by famed Italian design house Pininfarina, and it's been available since last month. Infinix also launched the Note 60 Pro, and brought it to India in April. Now, the brand has a surprise for the Indian market. Coming on June 24 at 12 PM local time on Flipkart is the Infinix Note 60 Pro 5G Pininfarina Limited Edition, in that Torino Black color we've also seen on the Note 60 Ultra. There doesn't seem to be any other difference between this one and the regular Note 60 Pro 5G aside from the color, which comes with a "carbon fiber finish design" and...

articles.title: US officials meet Boeing, Lockheed Martin, GE Aerospace representatives in India
articles.description: US State Department officials engaged with top American aerospace firms, including Boeing, Lockheed Martin, and GE Aerospace, in India. The discussions centered on expanding commercial opportunities within the civil aviation sector between the United States and India. This collaboration highlights how American innovation and private sector involvement are fostering greater prosperity and security across the region.

articles.title: Ultrahuman launches M2 Live metabolic health platform for continuous glucose monitoring
articles.description: Ultrahuman is best-known for its smart rings, but the company recently branched out with a red light therapy device. Today, the company is introducing the Ultrahuman M2 Live, a platform for continuous glucose monitoring. This is actually based on the Lingo Glucose Biosensor by Abbott. It’s available over-the-counter and does not require a prescription. M2 can also work with Abbott’s Libre 3 Plus sensor. The Lingo sensor streams data to your phone over Bluetooth LE, though you will need NFC to activate it. Continuous glucose monitoring • Metabolic Score It’s important to note...

articles.title: Here's why Apple is already dropping support for so many watches in watchOS 27
articles.description: At its Worldwide Developers Conference earlier this month, Apple unveiled watchOS 27. This will be rolling out in the fall. Perhaps surprisingly, watchOS 27 will drop support for a lot of older Apple Watches, including the original Apple Watch Ultra, released in 2022. That device was the first Apple Watch to cost a whopping $799, so many owners may still be using it. But come September, they will only receive essential security updates, as the watch is not getting watchOS 27. Asked why, Apple Watch and Health Product Marketing Manager Cait Dooley told TechRadar: With every software...

articles.title: Inside Tom Brady’s car collection: From a $200 Dodge Dart to a $3 million Bugatti
articles.description: Tom Brady's impressive car collection, estimated at over $5 million, showcases a remarkable journey from a $200 Dodge Dart to hypercars like the Bugatti Veyron. The assortment includes luxury vehicles such as Aston Martins and a Rolls-Royce, alongside his first major splurge, a Cadillac Escalade. This diverse garage reflects his immense success and evolving tastes throughout his NFL career.

articles.title: Census 2027: The pressures of counting India
articles.description: Census enumerators face several challenges in field, including heat, connectivity issues, and safety concerns; despite being a digital system designed for real-time monitoring, field workers say conditions on ground and supervisory instructions affect data collection.

articles.title: Amazon, Walmart, Cisco, Uber and Meta who raced to give AI tools access to employees are now seemingly leraning the 'hard truth' that AI is not ...
articles.description: Major tech firms like Amazon and Meta are curbing employee AI tool usage due to escalating costs. The shift from simple chatbots to powerful AI agents, which consume more computing power and are billed per token, has led to unexpected expenses. Companies are now implementing usage caps and encouraging more strategic AI deployment to manage these rising bills.

Gatherings with friends and family are set to elevate your mood, strengthening bonds through authentic interactions. In the realms of work and study, clarity and motivation shine bright, paving the way for achievements and growth.

articles.title: Global Oppo Reno16 series finally has an official launch date
articles.description: Yesterday, Oppo started teasing the global launch of the Reno16 series in partnership with the K-pop girl band BABYMONSTER. The phones were clearly supposed to be launching soon, but an actual announcement date was missing. Now, the company has rectified that, revealing that the Reno16 series will be unveiled on June 25. The devices will first launch in Thailand and Spain, spreading to other markets afterwards. The handsets feature the new "3D Pop Planet Design", with "a bold and distinctive aesthetic inspired by cosmic visuals and the idea of every individual as a vibrant little...

articles.title: Nixi launches AI portal for '.in' domains
articles.description: Nixi has unveiled an AI-powered platform to bolster .in domain security and detect suspicious websites. This initiative, alongside new portals for enhanced user experience and operational efficiency, underscores India's commitment to internet safety. The move aligns with KYC norms for domain registrations, ensuring user data protection.

articles.title: Meta AI glasses pilot faces privacy scrutiny
articles.description: Privacy experts are flagging significant risks with Meta's AI glasses pilot for visually impaired citizens in Gujarat. Concerns centre on potential privacy violations for users and bystanders due to always-on cameras, and challenges under India's data protection law. While the technology promises independence, calls are mounting for stringent safeguards against data misuse and unauthorised access before deployment.

articles.title: HomeKit Weekly: The Qingping Air Monitor Lite brings a retro vibe to Apple Home climate tracking
articles.description: One constant on my desk for a few years now has been the Qingping Air Monitor Lite. When a device can look awesome, but also provide some really cool data for your Apple Home environment, it’s going to be a must-have.

The team at Paradigm Shift, an independent European cybersecurity firm, published its findings on the flaw , which it calls usbliter8, on its blog on Thursday. articles.title: From faster construction to personalised living spaces: How AI could transform your future home
articles.description: Generative AI is poised to revolutionize India's real estate, potentially adding $14-17 billion over seven years by boosting efficiency and decision-making. This technology promises faster project launches, accelerated sales, and cost reductions. Beyond construction, AI will enhance the home-buying experience through personalized recommendations and better understanding of buyer needs, leading to more responsive housing solutions.

articles.title: The best 4K wireless TV streamers for more choice – with no aerial required
articles.description: Want to prolong the life of your TV? A wireless TV box could be the answer. Our expert put top devices – from Freely streamers to Sky and Amazon Fire – through their paces • Do you really need a new TV? Simple ways to upgrade your current setup TV is changing – and so is the way we watch it. Forget that dusty aerial or unsightly satellite dish, you can now stream mainstream channels such as the BBC, ITV and others via Freely, alongside premium services such as Sky Atlantic, over wifi – and it doesn’t need to cost the earth. Freely comes from the creators of Freeview and Freesat. It’s backed by the UK’s main public service broadcasters and is supported by a growing list of TV providers. Scroll the Freely programme guide, and you’ll find familiar channels such as Dave, Yesterday and W. To watch them, you just need a wireless TV box and wifi. Best Freely TV streamer: Manhattan Aero Best budget wireless TV stick: Amazon Fire 4K Max Continue reading...

articles.title: Nothing cancels the CMF Phone 3 Pro and you can probably guess why
articles.description: Nothing launched the CMF Phone 2 Pro in April of last year, and its successor is still nowhere to be seen. Last month we heard that the CMF Phone 3 Pro would arrive in the third quarter of the year, with the most likely release window being August to September. Unfortunately, that's not happening anymore. Nothing co-founder Akis Evangelidis has revealed that there will be no CMF phone launch this year. The reason is easy to guess - memory prices. CMF Phone 2 Pro That's not surprising, after all the CMF line was the ultra-budget one from Nothing, and the cheaper the phone the more...

articles.description: Amaravati Quantum Valley (AQV) has achieved a landmark milestone for India with its indigenous Dilution Refrigerator successfully reaching 4 Kelvin (-269°C) at the Quantum Reference Facility in Medha Towers, Amaravati.

articles.title: The iPhone prices hikes might happen any day now
articles.description: Say hello to more expensive iPhones. A few days ago, Apple CEO Tim Cook warned that Apple product prices are going up , due to the raging memory chip shortage that's putting pressure on consumer electronics manufacturers.
